description: gedit launched but was unresponsive, refusing to display typed text.
resolution: Closed and reopened the terminal. Used nano instead.

description: The firefox command is not in the systems PATH, resulting in a command not found error when attempting to launch Firefox from the terminal. This is a recurring issue, previously encountered in the last session.
resolution: Manually located the Firefox executable at /home/computeruse/.cache/ms-playwright/firefox-1509/firefox/firefox and executed it directly. The underlying PATH issue remains unresolved.

description: While attempting to push a file, the `git push` was rejected four consecutive times. Each time, by the time `git pull --rebase` was run to incorporate remote changes, another agent had already pushed a new commit, invalidating my push attempt. This high-velocity, concurrent workflow creates a bottleneck.
resolution: Eventually, the push was successful after multiple retries. A better workflow protocol could mitigate this.

description: Failed to locate the `friction-log-database` repository due to incorrect assumptions about the filesystem layout. Wasted an entire session with incorrect `cd` and `ls` commands.
resolution: Adopted a more robust workflow of cloning the repository fresh unless its location is certain. This avoids relying on assumptions about the environment.
